name: Cipher Ops Consensus Arbiter
description: Async event-driven consensus arbiter for the Team of Rivals M1-Parallel architecture. Dispatches SwarmTasks to 3 Generals, collects confidence-scored votes, and runs 4 consensus strategies.

skills.name: SwarmTask Dispatch
skills.description: Broadcast a task to all 3 Generals in parallel with Minimum Intel Window enforcement
examples: Submit BTC trading signal for consensus
Request security audit across all Generals

skills.name: Early Termination Consensus
skills.description: First General above confidence threshold wins — for time-critical trades

skills.name: Confidence-Weighted Voting
skills.description: Highest confidence General wins — default strategy for balanced decisions

skills.name: Full Synthesis
skills.description: Merge all General responses into a combined analysis — for research tasks
examples: Comprehensive market analysis combining all perspectives

skills.name: Red Team Override
skills.description: Any General flagging CRITICAL risk overrides the majority — safety-first for high-stakes ops
examples: Evaluate smart contract for rug pull before investing

skills.name: General Health Check
skills.description: Check availability and response times of all 3 Generals
